title: Crispy Pork Knuckle with Mediterranean Stir Fry
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish that combines the crunch of a crispy pork knuckle with the flavors of a Mediterranean-inspired stir fry.
instructions: Season the pork knuckle with Mediterranean seasoning.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork knuckle until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the pork knuckle to the oven and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the pork is cooking, heat some oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the garlic, ginger, bell peppers, and onions to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the tomatoes, soy sauce, and honey to the skillet and stir to combine.
Serve the Mediterranean stir fry with the crispy pork knuckle on top.
Let the pork rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
